Level 1 Effect: When one of your Mages is shadowed or moved by an opponent, wound any placed Mage belonging to that opponent.
Level 2 Effect: When one of your Mages is banished, banish a Mage belonging to the player who Banished it.
Level 3 Effect: After one of your Mages is wounded, choose and wound two Mages owned by the player who wounded yours.

Level 1 Effect: The next time you cast a Spell this turn, do not exhaust it.
Level 2 Effect: Until the start of your ntext turn, players may not cast Spells.
Level 3 Effect: For the rest of this round, you may move your wounded Mages after the action that wounded them. Still gain Infirmary Bonuses.

Level 1 Effect: Until your next turn, all of your Mages are immune to all Spells.
Level 2 Effect: Until your next turn, all your Mages are immune to all negative effects (Spells, Vault Cards, and other Mages).
Level 3 Effect: After one of your Mages would be moved, wounded, or banished, by a spell, gain Mana equal to the cost of that spell.

Level 1 Effect: Return up to two of your Mages from the Infirmary to your Office.
Level 2 Effect: Return all of your Mages in the Infirmary to your Office.
Level 3 Effect: Return all Mages in the Infirmary to their Offices. Gain 2 IP if you returned at least one opponent's Mage to their Office.

Level 1 Effect: Return a Mage from the Infirmary to its owner's Office.
Level 2 Effect: Move a Mage from the Infirmary to an open slot of your choice.
Level 3 Effect: Move a Mage from the Infirmary to any slot. You may wound an opponent's Mage in order to place your own.

Level 1 Effect: Until the start of your next turn, your Mages are immune to wounding.
Level 2 Effect: For the rest of the round, your Mages are immune to wounding.
Level 3 Effect: Place as many Mages as you wish into a single room, then Lock that room.

Level 1 Effect: Swap this Spell for a (non-starter, non-legendary) level 1 Spell from another player and exhaust both Spells.
Level 2 Effect: Discard an opponent's (non-starter, non- legendary) level 1 Spell to the bottom of the Spell Deck. He keeps the INT on it.
Level 3 Effect: Steal 1 unspent INT from a player with more INT than you OR steal 1 unspent WIS from a player with more WIS than you.

Level 1 Effect: Until your next turn, Mages cannot be placed.
Level 2 Effect: When one of your Mages is wounded, moved, or banished, it instead shadows the slot it previously occupied.
Level 3 Effect: Swap ownership badges between two Mages on the board. Their ownership is permanently swapped.

Level 1 Effect: Until your next turn, all Mages (except those immune to Spells) lose their powers.
Level 2 Effect: Cast another Spell. Then, place any Mage you control.
Level 3 Effect: Gain a Secret Supporter.

Level 1 Effect: Steal 1 mana from a single opponent.
Level 2 Effect: Cast a Level 1 Spell from the Spell Tableau, paying all costs.
Level 3 Effect: X is the number of opponents in the game.\nDuring this round, opponents must pay you 1 extra mana in order to cast a Spell.

Level 1 Effect: Wound a Mage. Its owner gains no Infirmary bonus.
Level 2 Effect: Wound a Mage and place one of yours in its slot. Its owner gains no Infirmary Bonus.
Level 3 Effect: Wound all Mages in a room, and their owners receive no Infirmary bonuses.

Level 1 Effect: Wound a Mage OR banish a Mage.
Level 2 Effect: Choose two adjacent rooms. Wound one Mage in each of them.
Level 3 Effect: Choose up to four adjacent rooms. Wound one Mage in each of them.

Level 1 Effect: When one of your Mages is wounded or moved, refresh an exhausted Spell or Treasure.
Level 2 Effect: When one of your Mages is wounded or moved, place it into an empty slot.
Level 3 Effect: When one of your Mages is wounded or moved, place it into an empty slot, then refresh an exhausted Spell or Treasure.

Level 1 Effect: Banish an opponent's Mage.
Level 2 Effect: Banish an opponent's Mage and place a Mage from your Office in its place.
Level 3 Effect: Banish all Mages in a room.

Level 1 Effect: Until your next turn, your Mages are immune to being wounded and moved.
Level 2 Effect: For the rest of the round, your mages are immune to being wounded and moved.
Level 3 Effect: For the rest of the round, your Mages lose their innate powers, but become immune to all negative effects.

Level 1 Effect: Wound an opponent's Mage.
Level 2 Effect: Wound an opponent's Mage, then place a Mage of your own.
Level 3 Effect: Wound an opponent's Mage, then place a Mage of your own. You may then cast another Spell.

Level 1 Effect: Move an opponent's Mage to another open slot in the same room.
Level 2 Effect: Rearrange all Mages in a room.
Level 3 Effect: Wound a Mage, then rearrange the rest of the Mages in that room.

Level 1 Effect: In a single room, wound a Mage, banish a Mage, and move a Mage to an open slot in the same room.
Level 2 Effect: Place a Mage into a room, then lock that room for the rest of the round.
Level 3 Effect: Banish all Mages in a room, then lock that room for the rest of the round.

Level 1 Effect: An opponent's Mage is now shadowing its slot. Place one of your Mages into the slot they were in.
Level 2 Effect: Shadow an empty slot.
Level 3 Effect: Shadow one of your own Mages.

Level 1 Effect: Place any Mage.
Level 2 Effect: Cast another Spell.
Level 3 Effect: Move up to 2 of your Mages to any open slots (you may move them out of the Infirmary).

Level 1 Effect: Choose a room. Place up to two of your Mages into it.
Level 2 Effect: After the last Bell Tower Offering is taken by another player, take two more ‘Place a Mage’ actions, without using Mage Powers.
Level 3 Effect: Take up to 3 more actions. Each must be a different type of action (using a Vault Card, Supporter, and Spell are all different types).

Level 1 Effect: Cast Spell that you have not yet researched from among your learned Spells (paying all mana costs).
Level 2 Effect: Cast one of your regular Action Spells at a level less than the highest level you've researched. Do not pay any additional mana or exhaust it.
Level 3 Effect: Cast one of your regular Action Spells of any level (it need not even be researched). Do not pay any additional mana or exhaust it.

Level 1 Effect: Shadow an opponent's Mage with one of your Mages.
Level 2 Effect: Move any number of Mages (yours or opponents') in a room into the shadow position.
Level 3 Effect: Choose a room. All Mages in that room are banished. Any that were shadowing move into normal spaces.

Level 1 Effect: Shadow two Mages with two of your Mages.
Level 2 Effect: For the rest of the round, your Mages can shadow opponent's Mages when placed.
Level 3 Effect: All of your placed Mages move to the Shadow position if able. For the rest of the round, you must Shadow opponents or empty slots.

Level 1 Effect: Gain a Mark.
Level 2 Effect: Gain two Research.
Level 3 Effect: Gain a Research, refresh an exhausted Spell, then gain a Mark.

Level 1 Effect: Gain a Mark.
Level 2 Effect: Take a normal action.
Level 3 Effect: Take two normal actions.

Level 1 Effect: For the rest of the round, your Spells cost 1 less mana.
Level 2 Effect: Refresh an exhausted Spell.
Level 3 Effect: Place a Mage into any slot. If the slot is occupied, wound the Mage there and take its place.

Level 1 Effect: Wound a Mage.
Level 2 Effect: Choose two adjacent rooms, wound one Mage in each.
Level 3 Effect: Would all Mages in two adjacent rooms.

Level 1 Effect: Gain 2 Maga.
Level 2 Effect: Gain 1 Mana and refresh a Spell.
Level 3 Effect: Refresh a Spell and then gain a Research.

Level 1 Effect: Wound up to two Mages in the same room.
Level 2 Effect: Wound a Mage, then lock the room it previously occupied.
Level 3 Effect: Banish one Mage belonging to each opponent. X is the number of opponents.

Level 1 Effect: Wound a Mage, then return a Mage from the Infirmary to its owner's office.
Level 2 Effect: Banish a Mage, then return all of your Mages in the Infirmary to your office.
Level 3 Effect: Wound all Mages in a room, then return all of your Mages in the Infirmary to your office.

Level 1 Effect: Wound a Mage shadowed by one of your Mages.
Level 2 Effect: Swap a Mage and the Mage shadowing it.
Level 3 Effect: Remove a Mage shadowed by one of your Mages from the game. Put a Mage of your choice from the supply into its owner's office.

Level 1 Effect: Wound a Mage that is in a room with one of your Mages
Level 2 Effect: Wound a Mage
Level 3 Effect: Wound a Mage in an opponent's office.

Level 1 Effect: Lock a room until the start of your next turn.
Level 2 Effect: Swap two Mages in two different rooms.
Level 3 Effect: Flip a room tile to its opposite side, then rearrange the Mages in the room as you wish. You cannot flip Central Campus rooms.

Level 1 Effect: Lock a room that currently has no Mages placed in it.
Level 2 Effect: Wound all Mages in a room, then lock that room.
Level 3 Effect: This can only be cast once per game. Wound all Mages in a non-central campus room, ignoring Mage powers. Destroy the room, returning it to the box.

Level 1 Effect: Exhaust an opponent's Treasure
Level 2 Effect: Discard a Treasure to its owner's discard pile.
Level 3 Effect: Use an opponent's Treasure Card, exhausting it after use.

Level 1 Effect: Your next action this turn cannot be reacted to.
Level 2 Effect: Exhaust an opponent's Spell or Treasure of your choice.
Level 3 Effect: Ready a Spell or Treasure.

Level 1 Effect: Gain 1 Research.
Level 2 Effect: Look at the top 3 Cards of any Deck, OR gain a Mark.
Level 3 Effect: Gain 1 WIS or 1 INT.

Level 1 Effect: The next time you would discard or exhaust a Vault Card this turn, keep it in your office or readied instead.
Level 2 Effect: Use a Vault Card in an opponent's office, but do not exhaust or discard it.
Level 3 Effect: Gain Gold equal to your INT, OR gain Mana equal to your WIS.

Level 1 Effect: Discard a ready Vault Card from your office to the Vault Deck to gain 4 Mana.
Level 2 Effect: Discard a Vault Card from your office to the Vault Deck to move two of your Mages to the corresponding shadow slots.
Level 3 Effect: Return a Vault Card from your office or discard to the Vault Deck to gain 1 WIS, OR gain 1 INT, OR gain 7 Mana.

Level 1 Effect: Choose a room. Move up to two Mages in that room from normal slots to the corresponding Shadow slots.
Level 2 Effect: Banish up to two Mages in the same room.
Level 3 Effect: Wound up to two Mages in the same room. You may place a Mage into that room.

Level 1 Effect: When the last Bell Tower Offering is taken by another player, you may place a Mage into any non-merit slot.
Level 2 Effect: When the last Bell Tower Offering is taken by another player, you may place a Mage in a merit slot.
Level 3 Effect: When the last Bell Tower Offering is taken by another plyaer, you may place a Mage in any empty shadow slot.
